name: Zucchini-Kuchen (Zucchini Cake)
recipeIngredient: Juice and grated peel of one lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry zucchini, trim ends. Grate unpeeled vegetables on a clean dish towel and pat dry.
2. Beat sugar and yolks until creamy; dissolve sugar completely.
3. Add lemon juice, lemon peel, salt, rum, flaked coconut to the mixture.
4. Cut candied cherries into halves or smaller pieces as desired and add them.
5. Mix flour and baking powder together, then add zucchini grated and the ingredients from step 4.
6. Beat chilled egg whites until stiff peaks form and gently fold into the batter.
7. Grease a 'Rehruecken' mold (and consider also floured).
8. Pour batter into prepared mold.
9. Bake at 350 to 390 degrees F for 40 to 50 minutes in a preheated oven.
10. Let cake cool in pan for 5 to 10 minutes, then carefully invert onto a grate and allow to cool completely.
11. Half a day before serving, cover the entire surface with chocolate glaze (200 g).
12. Allow glaze to dry, then shortly before serving, dust flaked coconut on top.
Note: Use dark cake glaze from Germany or any hard chocolate frosting recipe.
